description_long: This internet cafe is a rectangular, two-section building with a modern, utilitarian design. The structure features a larger main block with a flat, gray roof and a smaller, attached section with a darker blue roof, connected by a narrow passage. The facade includes a recessed entrance and a series of small, evenly spaced windows along the lower portion of the building. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The building sits on a slightly raised platform, suggesting a foundation or step-up from street level. There are no visible signs, advertisements, or decorative lighting on the exterior, giving it a subdued and practical appearance.
description: A modern, rectangular internet cafe with a flat gray and blue roof, light gray walls, and minimal exterior decoration. The building features a recessed entrance and small windows, emphasizing a functional, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entrance, the smaller blue-roofed section in the foreground, and the larger gray-roofed section behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the connection between the two sections, and a row of small windows at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large, flat gray roof and the back wall with minimal features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue-roofed section and the connection to the main building, with a few small windows visible.
